name: A WORD FOR TODAY
overview: Through exciting 30-minute segments, the unique teaching style of Pastor Stéphane Chauvette in delivering God’s Word ignites the heart of the believers and challenges them to produce life-changing results. His thought-provoking and challenging messages have been equipping believers for more than three decades.
